ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT GREGORY CHANCE'S Motion to Vacate Default Judgement for Improper Service.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's unopposed "motion to vacate default judgement for improper service" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Not present. Matter not reported.
(302/RBU)
